title: IIEST Shibpur Notification 2026 - Apply for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.E/ B.Tech or M.E/ M.Tech in Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the IIEST Shibpur Notification 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If y...
